name: Paella
recipeInstructions:
1. Wash and dry the chicken parts.
2. Rub the chicken with seasonings (salt and pepper).
3. Brown the chicken in oil in a large skillet until fully cooked through.
4. Add chorizo; cook over low heat for 10 minutes, stirring occasionally.
5. Add onion and green pepper; cook until softened, about 5 minutes more.
6. Stir in broth, tomato sauce, and saffron; cover and simmer on low heat for 20 minutes.
7. Stir in rice; cover and simmer for an additional 30 minutes.
8. Add shrimp and peas; stir to combine.
9. Allow any excess liquid to cook off before serving.
